examples: The closeout of an enterprise means the enterprise has permanently ceased its business activities.
Clark had a unique talent for taking off on hopeless closeout shorebreak waves and surviving in one piece.
The software project manager is responsible for ensuring that the software project comes to a successful completion as captured in the project Closeout Report.
Closeout retailer Consolidated Stores posted a 121% gain in earnings per share through October.
Overstock is the online retailer that sells closeout merchandise at discounts, based in Salt Lake City Utah and founded in 1997.
